reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module changes the boot process to enforce FIPS mode, which is not supported on an already installed RHEL 9 system and can render the system unbootable or lock out remote access. The fix requires kernel parameter changes and a reboot, posing a high risk of system breakage.
estimated_impact: reboot required; potential boot failure; loss of SSH/console access; non‑supported configuration on existing installations
